news.headline: UK DMO appoints syndicate to sell reopening of 4.375% 2040 gilt in week commencing January 20th.
NAVEE launches ST3 Pro and GT3 Pro electric scooters at CES 2025, receives UL and TÜV Rheinland certifications.
news.summary: NAVEE, a prominent player in smart short-range transportation, unveiled its premier electric scooters, the ST3 Pro and GT3 Pro, during the North American debut at CES 2025 in Las Vegas. The announcement, made on January 10, comes amidst the tech event held from January 7 to January 10. The event also signifies a significant milestone for the company as it solidifies its presence in the region.

news.headline: IDC report: Quadient, CCM leader, saw 13.7% revenue growth in 2023, fastest globally, outperforming market growth.
news.summary: Quadient, a global automation platform listed on Euronext Paris as QDT, has shown significant progress according to a recent IDC report. The IDC Worldwide CCM Software Market Shares, 2023 report highlights Quadient's impressive 13.7% year-over-year revenue growth in 2023, up from 11% in 2022. This growth rate surpasses that of other major Customer Communications Management (CCM) vendors worldwide, positioning Quadient as a top performer in the industry. The report, released in December 2024 under document #US52774224, illustrates Quadient's rapid advancement towards the top spot in the market.

news.headline: Tuya Smart showcases cutting-edge AI innovations at CES 2025, setting new standards for smart living.
news.summary: At the CES 2025 event in Las Vegas on January 10, 2025, Tuya Smart, a leading global cloud platform service provider, revealed its latest innovations. The company, listed on NYSE as TUYA and on HKEX as 2391, displayed groundbreaking technological advancements. These innovations aimed to offer fresh insights and perspectives to the audience.

news.headline: HK Monetary Authority to hold tender for 10-year HKD HKSAR Institutional Govt. Bonds on Jan 15, 2025. Interest rate: 3.84% p.a.
news.summary: On January 15, 2025, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority is set to hold a tender for 10-year HKD HKSAR Institutional Government Bonds. These bonds will offer an interest rate of 3.84% per annum to potential investors.

news.headline: BEST Inc. from China (NYSE: BEST) faces delay in filing semi-annual financial data for June 30, 2024 to NYSE.
news.summary: In Hangzhou, China, on January 10, 2025, BEST Inc. (NYSE: BEST), a prominent smart supply chain solutions and logistics services provider in China and Southeast Asia, shared that it had received a notification on January 6, 2025.

news.headline: China's Vice Finance Minister: China has relatively big room of raising debt and deficit.
Haute Residence and Sarah Fasullo extend their real estate partnership for the sixth year, representing the high-end Toronto market. (Word count: 21, Character count: 106)
news.summary: Sarah Fasullo, a renowned real estate agent, has extended her partnership with Haute Residence for the sixth consecutive year. Fasullo, an exclusive member of Haute Residence, specializes in representing the luxury real estate sector in Toronto, Canada. The partnership was announced on January 9, 2025.

news.headline: Tianma unveils new automotive display tech at CES 2025: OLED & Micro-LED products showcased in Nevada.
news.summary: A major flat panel displays manufacturer, Tianma, is showcasing its latest display technologies for the automotive industry at CES in Las Vegas, Nevada from January 7 to 10. They are presenting an array of OLED and Micro-LED products, including their innovative Dual-Screen technology.

news.headline: MotivatedSellers.com rebrands, unveils new platform for real estate investors with real-time lead delivery and mobile app.
news.summary: MotivatedSellers.com, previously known as NeedToSellMyHouseFast.com, has introduced a rebranding effort featuring a revamped platform and improved services. The updates include real-time lead delivery, a newly launched mobile application, and compliance enhancements designed to boost transparency and operational efficiency for real estate investors. The launch took place in AVENTURA, Fla. on Jan. 9, 2025.

news.headline: The article announces the Top 25 Consulting Firm CEOs of 2024. New York, Jan. 9, 2025.
news.summary: The Consulting Report recently revealed the Top 25 Consulting Firm CEOs of 2024 in New York on January 9, 2025. These top executives were recognized for their outstanding leadership in a rapidly changing business landscape, embracing advancements such as AI.

news.headline: BBB warns homeowners in Tri-Counties about donation scams post SoCal fires. Beware of click-bait, phishing, and bogus crowdfunding.
news.summary: BBB in Santa Barbara, California released warnings on Jan. 9, 2025, regarding donations to Southern California wildfire requests. They advised the public to be cautious of click-bait, phishing scams, and bogus crowdfunding requests. The Better Business Bureau Serving the Tri-Counties emphasized the importance of verifying donation sources to avoid falling victim to these deceptive tactics. It is crucial to remain vigilant and ensure that donations are made to legitimate organizations.

news.headline: The Software Report announces top 50 Software CEOs of 2024, showcasing influential leaders in the industry.
news.summary: The highly anticipated list of The Top 50 Software CEOs of 2024 has been released by The Software Report. This prestigious ranking, unveiled on January 10, 2025, showcases the top-performing chief executive officers leading prominent software companies worldwide. These exceptional CEOs are at the helm of organizations driving innovation and making a significant impact on the industry landscape.

China's Vice Finance Minister: We will speed up fiscal spending in a bid to formulate actual spending and drive up more social investment.
Tuya Smart hosts successful Developer Day at CES 2025, showcasing AI tech; NYSE: TUYA, HKEX: 2391.
news.summary: Tuya Smart, a leading global cloud platform service provider traded on NYSE as TUYA and HKEX as 2391, recently held its highly anticipated Tuya Developer Day event during CES 2025 in Las Vegas. The event attracted a large audience of innovators, decision-makers, and visionaries, all gathered to explore the theme "DIVE IN".

news.headline: Sciwind Biosciences signs global licensing and collaboration deal for metabolic disease portfolio on Jan 10, 2025 in Hangzhou, China.
news.summary: Hangzhou Sciwind Biosciences Co., a biopharmaceutical company in Hangzhou, China, specializing in pioneering treatments for metabolic diseases, revealed a recent partnership deal on Jan. 10, 2025. The company has finalized a licensing and collaboration agreement for worldwide advancement and distribution of their innovative therapies. The agreement signals a new phase for the company as it moves towards commercialization.

news.headline: ASE Technology Holding Co., Ltd. reveals unaudited consolidated net revenues for Dec 2024 with a significant increase from the previous month.
news.summary: Taipei, on January 10, 2025, ASE Technology Holding Co., Ltd. (NYSE: ASX, TAIEX: 3711, "ASEH" or the "Company") has disclosed the updated unaudited consolidated net revenues for December, the fourth quarter, and the full year of 2024. The consolidated net revenues for December show a sequential change from November of that year. The revised figures provide insight into the company's performance and financial standing for the specified periods.

news.headline: Amrop opens a new office in Japan through JOMON Associates, re-entering the market and expanding in Asia Pacific.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, in Brussels, a prominent global executive search and leadership consulting firm, Amrop, announced the appointment of JOMON Associates as its new team in Tokyo. This decision signifies Amrop's return to the Japanese market and enhances its presence in the Asia Pacific region. This strategic move will contribute to expanding their reach and strengthening their operations in the region.

news.headline: Bang & Olufsen reports H1 2024/25 interim results; group revenue down 1% mainly due to China, gross margin at 53.7%, raised DKK 228M in share issue.
news.summary: Despite experiencing positive revenue growth in the EMEA region and the Americas, the group saw a 1% decrease in overall revenue, mainly due to declining growth in China. The gross margin rose to 53.7% compared to the previous year. In November 2024, a planned directed share issue was executed successfully, resulting in gross proceeds of DKK 228 million.

Ant Group extends partnership with Olympic tennis champion Qinwen Zheng, as brand ambassador, emphasizing commitment to excellence.
news.summary: In Hangzhou, China, Ant Group has announced the extension of its partnership with Qinwen Zheng, the promising tennis star and Olympic gold medalist. This renewed collaboration highlights their joint dedication to pursuing greatness and motivating young individuals. Zheng expressed her enthusiasm about continuing as a brand ambassador for Ant Group, emphasizing the company's steadfast dedication to inclusivity and providing equal opportunities for development.

news.headline: Bitcoin hits $92K as speculators panic sell, creating a buying opportunity. Short-term holders suggest "buy the dip" strategy.
news.summary: According to recent research from CryptoQuant, short-term holders of Bitcoin may be signaling a traditional "buy the dip" opportunity to the market. This suggests that investors holding Bitcoin for a short period are considering purchasing more of the cryptocurrency at lower prices. This trend could impact the market positively, indicating potential buying activity and confidence among traders.

news.headline: Winners revealed for Dev.to and AssemblyAI Speech-to-Text Challenge, highlighting advancements in speech-to-text tech across categories.
news.summary: Recently, the winter Speech-to-Text challenge hosted by Dev.to and AssemblyAI came to an end, highlighting innovative projects. The victors presented applications that improve speech-to-text technology in diverse areas, demonstrating the impact of this advancement across various categories. For more details on the winning projects and their contributions, you can find the information in the full article.

news.headline: TECNO unveils groundbreaking Starry Optical Fiber tech at CES 2025, combining ultra-fine fibers with mini-LED lights in smartphone battery covers.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on January 10, 2025, TECNO introduced a pioneering CMF technology merging ultra-fine optical fibers with mini-LED lights in smartphone battery covers. The innovative brand unveiled its latest breakthrough called Starry Optical Fiber, marking a significant advancement in the industry.

news.headline: US economists predict fewer jobs added in December, with unchanged unemployment rate. Consensus: 154,000 jobs vs 227,000 in November.
news.summary: Economists are anticipating a decline in December’s non-farm payrolls compared to November, due to the impact of hurricanes and strikes in October and the boost in jobs from returning workers in November. The Bureau of Labor Statistics will release the official monthly jobs report at 8:30 a.m. ET on Friday, along with data on December’s unemployment rate and annual hourly wages. TradingEconomics predicts a net gain of 154,000 jobs in December, while Bloomberg estimates 165,000 jobs. RSM US chief economist Brusuelas expects 180,000 new jobs. The preliminary consumer sentiment data for January will be announced at 10:00 a.m. ET. Full story on Benzinga.com.

SN BioScience's SNB-101 advances to Phase 2 with FDA IND clearance for Phase 1b/2 trial, a significant milestone.
news.summary: South Korean company, SN BioScience, revealed today that its primary product, SNB-101, has obtained approval for Investigational New Drug (IND) from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for a Phase 1b/2 clinical trial. This marks a significant milestone for the company after the designation of...

QIAGEN enhances QIAcuity Digital PCR, doubling targets analyzed to deepen insights from samples. #QGEN #QIA #dPCR
news.summary: VENLO, Netherlands - QIAGEN revealed that its QIAcuity Digital PCR system has been enhanced to enable the analysis of over double the number of targets from a single biological sample, addressing challenges faced by existing quantitative multiplex PCR methods. This advancement signifies a substantial leap in the system's capabilities, making it well-suited for diverse applications. The system, listed on NYSE as QGEN and Frankfurt Prime Standard as QIA, continues to lead in digital PCR technology.

Meta's lack of fact checking could impact the web's integrity, warns Bloomberg.
Fed officials stay 'neutral' on policy amid strong economy; await clarity on Trump's policies to make further decisions.
news.summary: Federal Reserve officials in the United States have chosen to maintain a "neutral" policy stance in light of the robust economic performance. They are currently awaiting further details on President Donald Trump's policies before making any significant changes. This decision comes amidst key economic indicators showing promise, with unemployment reaching a low of 4.1% and the GDP growth rate standing at a solid 3.1% in the latest quarter. The Federal Reserve's decision reflects a cautious approach towards any potential shifts in monetary policy moving forward.

news.headline: THORChain (RUNE) unveils major advancements in 2024 with new integrations, liquidity changes, and upgrades for network efficiency and security.
news.summary: The year-end report for THORChain in 2024 showcases significant progress with various upgrades and integrations aimed at boosting network efficiency and security. The report emphasizes key improvements including new partnerships, changes in liquidity, and strategic enhancements. This effort is focused on positioning THORChain as a robust and secure network for its users.

Ultima Markets wins "Best APAC CFD Broker 2024" at Traders Fair, setting new standards in trading industry.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, in Hong Kong, Ultima Markets marked a significant achievement for the financial trading sector with the conclusion of the Traders Fair in a spectacular fashion. This internationally renowned occasion gathered a large number of traders, investors, and specialists to commemorate success collectively. Ultima Markets showcased groundbreaking innovations and insights during the event, solidifying its position as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: AS Ekspress Grupp's Q4 2024 digital subscriptions rose by 15% in Baltic States (to 238,182), compared to 7% in Q4 2023.
news.summary: In the Baltic States, AS Ekspress Grupp saw a 15% increase in their total digital subscriptions compared to the previous year, with a notable 7% growth in the 4th quarter alone. As of December, the total number of digital subscriptions reached 238,182.

news.headline: Rumors swirl as Trump nears inauguration: US Senate eyes inaugural crypto subcommittee, appoints pro-crypto CFTC Commissioner.
news.summary: Recent reports indicate that the US Senate Banking Committee is considering establishing its inaugural subcommittee dedicated to cryptocurrencies. Additionally, it has been reported that former President Trump is interested in appointing a pro-cryptocurrency individual as the Commissioner of the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC).These developments highlight the increasing importance of cryptocurrencies in government discussions.

Crypto sentiment index falls to October levels; Bitcoin drops below $92K. Index last in “Neutral” zone on Oct 14 at $63K.
news.summary: Since October 14th, the market sentiment index score has not reached the "Neutral" zone. At that time, Bitcoin was valued at approximately $63,000.

news.headline: U.S. Ambassador Burns warns China is aligned with 'agents of disorder' like Russia, Iran, and North Korea.
news.summary: The latest comments from R. Nicholas Burns, the key U.S. official in Beijing, reveal that the Biden administration is intensifying efforts to persuade China to reassess its alignment with Russia, Iran, and North Korea.
